programs.title: Savage Kingdom
programs.desc: Nothing will stop ruthless predators on their way to their prey.Their survival depends on large herds of animals that have been coming to the same place year after year for millennia to quench their thirst.Lions, leopards and hyenas know perfectly well that they will not survive if they do not engage in a fierce fight to the death.The creators of the series will show this fight from a different perspective.They will present the brutal world of animals from both the predator and the prey perspective.Viewers will witness a bloody struggle for power against the background of beautiful African landscapes.They will learn the motives behind every move of the fighters and see that it is a world where no one stays on top forever, and only the strongest survive.

programs.title: Secrets of the Penguins
programs.desc:
For two years, National Geographic explorer Bertie Gregory closely studied the tight-knit communities of some of the world's most intelligent penguins.He documented behaviors and situations that had previously been difficult to capture on camera.The series proves that penguins are much closer to humans than was previously known.These unique flightless birds are brave and adventurous, and at the same time value family bonds and friendship.Thanks to their ingenuity, they can survive in the most extreme conditions
Millions of years ago, a group of penguins left the icy lands, using powerful ocean currents that carried them to distant lands.Over time, these birds adapted to living in completely different places - from deserts, through the tropics, to areas inhabited by people.The fight against adversity made them one of the most intelligent birds in the world.National Geographic explorer Bertie Gregory examines their problem-solving skills, communication methods, and motivation to explore new environments.

programs.title: America the Beautiful: Mighty Northwest
programs.desc: The Cascade Mountains located in the USA are among the most dangerous regions in North America.Among their peaks you can find as many as 13 volcanoes, 7 of which have erupted in the last 300 years.

programs.title: Growing up Animal
programs.desc: Viewers meet adolescent animals of various species from distant corners of the world.They will see how they develop in the mother's womb, come into the world and struggle with the first challenges in life.
